mnemonics.title: HYPERTUNE
mnemonics.content: Hyperparameters: Set Before Training, Parameters: Updated During Training

mnemonics.title: KFC Validation
mnemonics.content: K-Fold Cross-validation: Keep Fold Consistent (same evaluation method)

acronyms.usage: Used when maximum training data is critical

visualTips.visualization: Plot training/validation scores against dataset size - gap indicates over/underfitting
Imagine parameter grid matrix with performance heatmap

analogies.analogy: Like tuning a car engine - adjusting knobs (hyperparameters) for optimal performance
Similar to rotating jury members - multiple independent assessments reduce bias
